strings.alarm_empty_hint: Gumawa ng iyong unang alarm para simulan ang pagbuo ng workflow ng shift mo
strings.search_time_zone: Maghanap ng lungsod o time zone
strings.add_clock_hint: I-tap the plus button to magdagdag a mundo orasan
strings.alarm_time_tap_hint: I-tap ang oras para manu-manong ilagay
strings.alarm_exact_permission_title: Payagan ang mga alarm at paalala
strings.alarm_exact_permission_message: Para i-i-save at i-on exact wake-up mga alarm, payagan ang app na ito to iskedyul mga alarm sa mga setting ng system.
strings.alarm_readiness_description: On some devices, especially Xiaomi/MIUI, mga alarm can be delayed or missed kapag nakasara ang app. Suriin the items sa ibaba to improve pagiging maaasahan.
strings.alarm_xiaomi_tip_message: If mga alarm still trabaho inconsistently kapag nakasara ang app, allow autostart for ShiftAlarm and alisin battery restrictions in MIUI mga setting.
strings.open_app_settings: Buksan ang mga setting ng app
strings.alarm_notifications_not_ready: Notifications ay hindi pinagana. Alarm mga alerto maaaring maitago o ma-block.
strings.alarm_exact_not_ready: Exact mga alarm ay hindi pinapayagan. Wake-up mga alarm maaaring hindi tumunog sa oras.
strings.open_exact_alarm_settings: Buksan ang setting ng eksaktong alarm
strings.alarm_battery_ready: Mga limitasyon ng baterya are relaxed para sa app na ito.
strings.alarm_battery_not_ready: Battery optimization ay aktibo pa. Xiaomi/MIUI maaaring maantala o mapigilan ang mga alarm kapag nakasara ang app.
strings.alarm_app_settings_description: Buksan ang pahina ng mga setting ng app para suriin autostart, aktibidad sa background, gawi sa lock screen, and mga pahintulot na partikular sa manufacturer.
strings.alarm_runtime_diagnostics_title: Diagnostics ng mga kaganapan ng alarm
strings.alarm_runtime_diagnostics_empty: Wala pang diagnostic kaganapan ng alarm.
strings.alarm_runtime_log_description: Buksan ang buong kaganapan log, pagkatapos ay kopyahin at ipadala para sa pagsusuri.
strings.alarm_runtime_log_empty: Wala pang kaganapan sa log ng alarm.
strings.alarm_module_rebuild_placeholder: Alarm module na-reset na and ay handa for clean rebuild.
strings.alarm_runtime_log_placeholder_descriptio: Previous alarm module inalis. Babalik ang diagnostics pagkatapos buuing muli.
strings.alarm_diagnostics_unavailable_body: Alarm module inalis. Babalik ang diagnostics pagkatapos buuing muli.
strings.alarm_time_section_body: Pumili ng oras para sa susunod na alarm sa paggising.
strings.alarm_reliability_warning_body: Ilang kinakailangang setting ay hindi pinagana. Sa ilang device, mga alarm maaaring hindi gumana kapag nakasara ang app or inalis sa recent apps.
strings.alarm_reliability_warning_action: Ayusin ang mga setting ng pagiging maaasahan
strings.alarm_delete_confirm_body: Permanenteng buburahin ang alarm na ito.
strings.alarm_manual_time_hint: Ilagay ang oras sa format na HH:mm
strings.alarm_notification_channel_description: Mga notification ng tumutunog na alarm
strings.alarm_guard_channel_description: Proteksyon sa foreground for mga naka-iskedyul na alarm
strings.alarm_custom_sound_limit_body: Maaari kang mag-i-save ng hanggang {count} pasadyang tunog.
strings.alarm_sound_custom_limit_reached: Maaari kang mag-i-save ng hanggang {count} pasadyang tunog
strings.alarm_sound_custom_limit_hint: Naabot na ang pinakamataas na bilang ng naka-i-save na tunog
strings.alarm_sound_delete_confirm_body: This tunog ay aalisin from the list. Mga alarm using it will switch to the system tunog.
strings.alarm_sound_limit_body: Maaari kang mag-i-save ng hanggang {count} pasadyang tunog.
strings.alarm_sound_duplicate_name_body: A pasadya tunog with the same file pangalan is na na-i-save.
strings.alarm_invalid_date_time_past: The napili petsa and oras must be mamaya than the kasalukuyan oras.
strings.alarm_past_date_not_allowed: You hindi maaaring gumawa an alarm for a past petsa.
strings.alarm_gate_body: To ensure mga alarm trabaho reliably, please allow the kinakailangan mga setting and mga pahintulot.
strings.alarm_gate_warning: Without these mga setting mga alarm may Hindi trabaho kapag nakasara ang app.
strings.alarm_gate_battery_hint: Battery ayusin bumubukas your app mga setting una. On some devices, then allow background usage or alisin battery limits para sa app na ito.
strings.alarm_reliability_all_ready: Everything is naka-configure. Mga alarm should trabaho reliably.
strings.alarm_reliability_not_ready: Some mga setting may prevent mga alarm from working kapag nakasara ang app.
strings.alarm_reliability_important_hint: Mahalaga: the battery ayusin bumubukas your app mga setting una. On some devices, then allow background usage or alisin battery limits para sa app na ito.
strings.alarm_vendor_hint_body: On Xiaomi, Samsung and some iba devices, additional battery restrictions may block mga alarm kapag nakasara ang app. If needed, buksan your app mga setting and allow aktibidad sa background para sa app na ito.
strings.alarm_vendor_hint_action: Buksan ang mga setting ng app
strings.alarm_runtime_log_body: Buksan the diagnostics screen to inspect alarm mga kaganapan and pagiging maaasahan behavior.
strings.settings_permissions_section_ready: Lahat kinakailangan alarm mga pahintulot and pagiging maaasahan mga setting are naka-configure.
strings.settings_permissions_section_not_ready: Suriin mga pahintulot and battery mga setting to gawing mga alarm trabaho reliably.
strings.settings_diagnostics_section_body: Inspect alarm runtime mga kaganapan and pagiging maaasahan diagnostics.
strings.settings_theme_section_body: Pumili the hitsura mode and tactile feedback behavior.
strings.settings_haptic_body: Paganahin maikli vibration feedback for sinusuportahan mga interaksyon in the app.
strings.settings_language_sheet_body: The app awtomatiko uses the system wika when available. You can manually i-i-download and switch to another sinusuportahan wika dito.
strings.settings_language_load_failed: Nabigo to load the wika list. Suriin your connection at subukan muli.
strings.settings_language_download_failed: Nabigo to i-i-download or install the napili wika.
strings.settings_contact_button_body: Buksan your email app and gumawa a message to suporta@insdeco.ru.
strings.settings_contact_email_unavailable: Walang email app na available sa device na ito.
strings.settings_permissions_button_body: Buksan alarm mga pahintulot and pagiging maaasahan mga setting.
strings.settings_diagnostics_button_body: Buksan diagnostic sections for iba-ibang app mga function.
strings.settings_language_button_body_short: Buksan available app languages and manage manwal installation.
strings.settings_permissions_header_body: Alarm and geo-alarm mga pahintulot, lokasyon access and device-tiyak pagiging maaasahan mga setting are pinagsama dito.
strings.settings_diagnostics_header_body: Diagnostic sections for iba-ibang app mga function are pinagsama dito.
strings.settings_theme_header_body: Pumili the hitsura mode and interface vibration behavior.
strings.settings_diagnostics_master_body: Pangunahing switch for lahat diagnostic sections in the app.
strings.settings_diagnostics_alarm_body: Alarm delivery, scheduling, recovery, guard and ringing mga kaganapan.
strings.settings_diagnostics_timer_body: Timer simula, pause, resume, reset, tapusin, ibalik, notification and tapos-screen mga kaganapan.
strings.alarm_diagnostics_actions_body: Kopyahin, i-clear or ipadala the kasalukuyan alarm diagnostic ulat.
strings.alarm_diagnostics_send_hint: For diagnostic ulat delivery, it is inirerekomenda to pumili an email app.
strings.alarm_diagnostics_clear_confirm_body: Lahat ng nakaimbak na diagnostic mga kaganapan ay permanenteng buburahin.
strings.settings_diagnostics_clock_body: Mundo orasan list, ibalik flow, and magdagdag or alisin oras zone actions.
strings.clock_diagnostics_send_hint: For diagnostic ulat delivery, it is inirerekomenda to pumili an email app.
strings.clock_runtime_log_empty_body: Gamitin the mundo orasan mga function muli and the lalabas dito ang kaganapan log.
strings.clock_diagnostics_clear_confirm_body: Lahat ng nakaimbak na orasan diagnostic mga kaganapan ay permanenteng buburahin.
strings.timer_diagnostics_send_hint: For diagnostic ulat delivery, it is inirerekomenda to pumili an email app.
strings.timer_runtime_log_empty_body: Gamitin the timer muli and the lalabas dito ang kaganapan log.
strings.timer_diagnostics_clear_confirm_body: Lahat ng nakaimbak na timer diagnostic mga kaganapan ay permanenteng buburahin.
strings.settings_diagnostics_stopwatch_body: Stopwatch simula, pause, reset, lap, history, ibalik and notification mga kaganapan.
strings.stopwatch_diagnostics_send_hint: For diagnostic ulat delivery, it is inirerekomenda to pumili an email app.
strings.stopwatch_runtime_log_empty_body: Gamitin the stopwatch muli and the lalabas dito ang kaganapan log.
strings.stopwatch_diagnostics_clear_confirm_body: Lahat ng nakaimbak na stopwatch diagnostic mga kaganapan ay permanenteng buburahin.
strings.settings_backup_button_body: Gumawa a backup file with app mga setting, mga alarm, mga orasan, timer and stopwatch data.
strings.settings_backup_create_body: The backup includes mga setting, mga alarm, pasadya alarm tunog references, mundo mga orasan, timer data, stopwatch data, mga tala and audio tala mga file. Diagnostic logs are hindi included.
strings.settings_backup_header_body: Gumawa a JSON backup file that you can i-save, ipadala to yourself or upload to cloud storage. Ibalik validation is available bago buong import.
strings.settings_backup_restore_body: Pumili the previously created backup file. At this point, the app will verify the file and palitan the kasalukuyan data.
strings.settings_backup_restore_confirm_body: Kasalukuyan app mga setting, mga alarm, mga orasan, timer, stopwatch data, mga tala and audio tala mga file will be replaced by the napili backup file.
strings.settings_backup_restore_restart_body: Backup data was naibalik matagumpay. I-restart the app so lahat naibalik mga setting, mga alarm, mga orasan, timer and stopwatch data are displayed correctly.
strings.shift_template_one_three_full_day: 24 mga oras on / 3 mga araw off
strings.settings_diagnostics_shifts_body: Shift mga iskedyul, overrides, backup, ibalik and pagkalkula mga kaganapan.
strings.shift_diagnostics_send_hint: For diagnostic ulat delivery, it is inirerekomenda to pumili an email app.
strings.shift_runtime_log_empty_body: Gumawa or i-edit shift mga iskedyul and the lalabas dito ang kaganapan log.
strings.shift_diagnostics_clear_confirm_body: Lahat ng nakaimbak na shift diagnostic mga kaganapan ay permanenteng buburahin.
strings.shifts_screen_header_body: The shift module storage layer is connected. Next hakbang: list mga iskedyul and gumawa templates.
strings.shifts_screen_status_body: Database, mga modelo, backup/ibalik and diagnostics are prepared. UI creation will be added hakbang by hakbang.
strings.shifts_empty_body: Gumawa your una iskedyul from a template. The app will calculate mga shift from a siklo, hindi from na-i-save mga petsa.
strings.shifts_list_header_body: Mga iskedyul are kinakalkula from a simula petsa and repeating pattern. Petsa mga pagbabago will be handled mamaya through overrides.
strings.shifts_create_body: Pumili a template and simula petsa. The iskedyul will be kinakalkula from this siklo.
strings.shifts_delete_confirm_body: This shift iskedyul ay buburahin permanently.
strings.calendar_change_shift_body: Gumawa a one-araw exception for this petsa
strings.shift_override_day_off_body: Palitan the kinakalkula shift with a personal araw.
strings.shift_override_sick_body: Markahan this petsa as may sakit leave.
strings.shift_override_custom_body: Palitan this petsa with a pasadya shift placeholder.
strings.shift_override_no_active_schedule: Gumawa or activate a shift iskedyul una.
strings.shifts_edit_body: Change the iskedyul pangalan or simula petsa. The pattern and overrides will remain unchanged.
strings.shifts_edit_template_locked: Template editing will be available mamaya in the pattern builder.
strings.shifts_custom_pattern_body: Set the order of mga araw in the repeating siklo. Time editing will be added mamaya.
strings.shift_override_range_body: Pumili one araw or a petsa saklaw for this exception.
strings.shift_override_range_start_locked: Simula petsa is the napili calendar araw.
strings.shift_override_range_end_body: I-tap to pumili the huling petsa of the exception.
strings.shifts_templates_picker_body: Pumili a handa-made shift iskedyul template.
strings.shifts_custom_create_body: Gumawa your own repeating shift siklo.
strings.shift_override_range_picker_body: Simula petsa is fixed. Pumili the wakas petsa.
strings.shift_override_replace_shift_body: Palitan the napili petsa or saklaw with a tiyak shift uri.
strings.shift_override_edit_shift_body: Palitan the napili petsa or saklaw with a tiyak shift uri and oras.
strings.shifts_template_locked_hint: The trabaho and araw-off sequence is fixed for this template.
strings.shifts_next_day_time_hint: The shift ends on the next araw.
strings.shifts_full_day_time_hint: Simula and wakas oras are the same. This is counted as a 24-hour shift.
strings.shifts_equal_time_warning_body: Simula and wakas oras are the same, so the shift will be counted as 24 mga oras. Are you sure the working oras is napili correctly?
strings.shifts_statistics_body: Mga istatistika are kinakalkula only for this shift iskedyul.
strings.shifts_salary_body: Sahod pagkalkula for the napili iskedyul and panahon.
strings.shifts_salary_not_configured: Sahod pagkalkula is hindi naka-configure yet
strings.shifts_salary_setup_body: Sahod pagkalkula for the napili iskedyul and panahon.
strings.shifts_work_break_body: I-configure whether pahinga oras is counted as trabaho oras.
strings.shifts_work_break_counted: Pahinga is counted as trabaho oras
strings.shifts_work_break_not_counted: Pahinga is subtracted from trabaho oras
strings.shifts_statistics_break_body: Set whether the pahinga is included in paid working oras.
strings.shifts_salary_overtime_threshold: Overtime pagkatapos mga oras per shift
strings.shifts_salary_deductions_body: Pahinga mga bawas are na included in nagtrabaho oras. Gamitin this field only for manwal mga bawas.
strings.shifts_initial_setup_body: Kumpletuhin the una setup. After pag-save, the simula petsa and siklo istruktura will be naka-lock to protektahan calendar mga pagbabago.
strings.shifts_start_date_locked_body: The simula petsa hindi maaaring be binago pagkatapos the una i-save. This protects na-i-save calendar mga pagbabago, bakasyon mga araw, may sakit mga araw and personal mga araw from being recalculated as a new iskedyul.
strings.shifts_cycle_locked_body: The siklo istruktura is naka-lock pagkatapos the una i-save. You can still i-edit shift simula and wakas oras.
strings.shift_override_edit_work_time_body: Adjust the nagtrabaho oras for this trabaho shift.
strings.shift_override_work_adjustment_body: Magdagdag overtime or reduce nagtrabaho oras for this trabaho araw.
strings.shift_override_day_off_work_adjustment_b: Set the nagtrabaho oras for this araw off. It can be counted as overtime.
strings.shift_override_work_adjustment_hint: If overtime is hindi pinagana, added oras is counted as regular nagtrabaho oras.
strings.shifts_salary_overtime_body: Gamitin overtime from shift mga pagbabago.
strings.shifts_salary_deductions_sheet_body: Magdagdag deduction mga row for the napili sahod panahon.
strings.shifts_salary_deduction_delete_body: This deduction row ay buburahin without the ability to ibalik it.
strings.shifts_salary_bonuses_body: Magdagdag manwal mga bonus or calculate them as a porsiyento of benta.
strings.shifts_salary_bonus_delete_body: This bonus row ay buburahin without the ability to ibalik it.
strings.shifts_salary_validation_monthly_require: For buwanan sahod, punan in pareho buwanan sahod and buwanan pamantayan mga oras.
strings.shifts_salary_validation_bonus_percent_r: To i-save a porsiyento-of-benta bonus with an halaga, enter the bonus porsiyento.
strings.shifts_report_body: Reports help ihambing nakumpleto mga panahon, sahod, trabaho oras, absences and mga pagsasaayos.
strings.shifts_report_entry_body: Reports by panahon, oras, and sahod.
strings.shifts_report_period_body: Pumili the panahon that should be kinakalkula in the ulat.
strings.shifts_report_status_completed_body: This panahon is nakumpleto. The ulat is kinakalkula from na-i-save iskedyul and sahod data.
strings.shifts_report_status_preliminary_body: The panahon is hindi tapos yet. Data is kinakalkula up to ngayon.
strings.shifts_report_status_upcoming_body: This panahon has hindi started yet. A ulat hindi maaaring be mabuo.
strings.shifts_report_short_summary: For {period}, you nagtrabaho {hours}, kinita {total}, and overtime was {overtime}.
strings.shifts_report_daily_rows_empty: No mga row for this panahon.
strings.shifts_report_export_body: I-save the ulat as PDF, HTML, JSON or CSV.
strings.shifts_report_compare_empty: No nakumpleto mga panahon to ihambing.
strings.shifts_report_daily_rows_entry_body: Buksan the detailed list of mga araw for this ulat panahon.
strings.shifts_report_custom_period_body: Pumili a tiyak buwan or set any simula and wakas mga petsa.
strings.shifts_report_compare_custom_periods_bod: Pumili up to 8 mga buwan, or magdagdag pasadya petsa ranges.
strings.shifts_report_compare_custom_periods_lim: You can ihambing up to 8 mga panahon.
strings.shifts_report_compare_empty_body: Pumili nakumpleto mga panahon or pasadya ranges to see paghahambing data.
strings.shifts_report_compare_delta_body: Each line shows how the next panahon binago compared with the previous one.
strings.shifts_report_export_screen_body: I-save the currently mabuo ulat. JSON is best for buong structured data, while CSV mga file are easier to buksan in spreadsheet apps.
strings.shifts_report_export_json_body: Buong structured ulat for backup, diagnostics, developer analysis or mamaya import-like processing.
strings.shifts_report_export_csv_summary_body: Compact table with sahod, trabaho oras, absences and panahon metrics. Suitable for spreadsheets.
strings.shifts_report_export_csv_daily_body: Detailed table with one row per araw: shift uri, oras, tagal, overtime, pahinga, pagsasaayos and tala.
strings.shifts_report_export_max_single_shift_mi: Pinakamataas na minuto sa isang shift
strings.shifts_report_export_pdf_body: Readable ulat file for sharing, printing or pag-save outside the app.
strings.shifts_report_export_html_body: Readable web-format ulat with sections and araw-araw mga row. Suitable for browser viewing and mamaya printing.
strings.alarm_shift_linked_body: The alarm will ring bago the next working shift in the aktibo iskedyul.
strings.alarm_shift_linked_no_active_schedule: No aktibo shift iskedyul. Gumawa or activate a iskedyul una.
strings.alarm_shift_linked_no_active_schedule_er: Gumawa or activate a shift iskedyul una.
strings.alarm_shift_linked_offset_hint: Saklaw: from 1 minute to 24 mga oras bago shift simula.
strings.alarm_shift_linked_fixed_time_summary: At {time} on the shift simula araw
strings.alarm_shift_linked_fixed_time_hint: If this oras has na pumasa for the kasalukuyan shift, the alarm will gamitin the next matching shift.
strings.alarm_shift_linked_invalid_offset_error: Pumili when the alarm dapat tumunog bago the shift starts.
strings.alarm_shift_schedule_inactive_warning: The shift iskedyul is turned off. Activate the trabaho iskedyul to paganahin this alarm.
strings.shift_alarm_enable_dialog_body: The iskedyul "{schedule}" is aktibo. Paganahin mga alarm linked to this iskedyul? Count: {count}.
strings.shift_alarm_auto_disabled_schedule_inact: Shift mga alarm were turned off because the iskedyul is no longer aktibo.
strings.shift_alarm_auto_enabled_schedule_active: Shift mga alarm were pinagana pagkatapos iskedyul activation.
strings.alarm_shift_linked_schedule_inactive_hin: This alarm is turned off because its shift iskedyul is inactive. Activate the iskedyul to gamitin this alarm.
strings.shift_alarms_section_body: Mga alarm linked to this iskedyul ring bago working mga shift.
strings.shift_alarms_schedule_inactive_body: This iskedyul is inactive. Shift mga alarm can be created, but they can only be pinagana pagkatapos the iskedyul is activated.
strings.shift_alarms_initial_setup_body: I-save the initial iskedyul setup una. After that, the alarm can be correctly linked to this iskedyul.
strings.shifts_delete_confirm_shift_alarms_body: {count} linked shift mga alarm will be turned off.
strings.alarm_shift_linked_shift_kind_body: Piliin kung aling mga shift this alarm dapat tumunog for.
strings.shift_alarm_choose_kind_body: This iskedyul has multiple trabaho shift mga uri. Piliin kung aling shift this alarm should be created for.
strings.notes_body: Text mga tala are nakaimbak locally. This foundation is prepared for structured mga tala, mga paalala, audio and voice-to-text mamaya.
strings.notes_empty_body: Gumawa your una text tala. Structured mga tala, mga paalala and audio will be added mamaya.
strings.notes_empty_validation: Magdagdag a pamagat or text bago pag-save.
strings.notes_search_empty_body: Try another search query or i-clear the search.
strings.notes_archive_empty_body: Archived mga tala will appear dito.
strings.notes_delete_confirm_body: This tala ay aalisin from the mga tala list.
strings.settings_diagnostics_notes_body: Note creation, editing, archiving, deleting, backup and ibalik mga kaganapan.
strings.notes_runtime_log_empty_body: Gumawa, i-edit or archive mga tala and the lalabas dito ang kaganapan log.
strings.notes_diagnostics_actions_body: Kopyahin, i-clear or ipadala the kasalukuyan mga tala diagnostic ulat.
strings.notes_diagnostics_clear_confirm_body: Lahat ng nakaimbak na mga tala diagnostic mga kaganapan ay permanenteng buburahin.
strings.notes_checklist_editor_hint: Magdagdag checklist items. Gamitin the + button or the keyboard action to magdagdag the next item.
strings.notes_unsaved_changes_body: I-save your mga pagbabago bago leaving this tala?
strings.notes_notification_channel_description: Notifications for tala mga paalala and mga kaganapan
strings.calendar_note_type_title: What do you want to gumawa?
strings.calendar_add_note_body: Gumawa an kaganapan or paalala for this petsa
strings.calendar_day_info_notes_none: No mga kaganapan or mga paalala
strings.notes_advance_reminder_empty_enabled_hin: Magdagdag kahit isa paunang paalala or turn this option off.
strings.notes_advance_reminder_picker_body: Pumili how long bago the napiling oras the paalala should fire.
strings.notes_advance_reminder_unavailable_past: There is no available oras bago this kaganapan. Move the kaganapan to the future una.
strings.notes_open_unavailable: This tala is no longer available.
strings.notes_notification_channel_description_v: High-priority mga notification for tala mga paalala and mga kaganapan
strings.notes_audio_permission_body: Allow microphone access to record audio mga tala.
strings.notes_audio_stop_before_save: Stop the recording bago leaving or pag-save.
strings.notes_audio_storage_error: Nabigo to i-save the audio file
strings.notes_voice_transcript_architecture_read: Voice transcript is prepared as a hiwalay tala uri. Pagkilala sa pagsasalita will be connected in the next hakbang.
strings.notes_voice_transcript_manual_edit_hint: You can i-edit transcript text manually.
strings.notes_voice_transcript_ready: I-tap Simula pagkilala and speak. You can i-edit the resulta manually bago pag-save.
strings.notes_transcript_unavailable: Pagkilala sa pagsasalita is hindi available on this device
strings.notes_transcript_stop_before_close: Stop pagkilala bago closing the tala
strings.notes_voice_transcript_language_locked: Wika hindi maaaring be binago while pagkilala is tumatakbo.
strings.notes_voice_transcript_backup_ready: Transcript text and metadata are included in backup and ibalik.
strings.notes_voice_transcript_offline_placehold: Offline pagsasalita mga modelo will be connected mamaya.
strings.notes_voice_transcript_dictation_active_: Dictation stays aktibo until you press Stop.
strings.notes_voice_transcript_settings_body: Online pagkilala is usually more accurate because it can gamitin the system or cloud pagkilala features of the device. Offline mode works without internet, but quality may be lower because processing runs on the phone and depends on the napili modelo.
strings.notes_voice_transcript_offline_model_mis: Offline modelo is hindi installed yet. I-i-download will be added in the offline module hakbang.
strings.notes_voice_transcript_settings_locked: Mga setting hindi maaaring be binago while dictation is aktibo. Stop pagkilala una.
strings.notes_transcript_offline_model_missing: Offline pagsasalita modelo is hindi installed.
strings.settings_speech_models_button_body: I-i-download and manage voice-to-text mga modelo for offline pagkilala.
strings.settings_speech_models_header_body: I-i-download pagsasalita mga modelo for offline voice-to-text pagkilala. Models are nakaimbak locally and checked with SHA-256 bago installation.
strings.settings_speech_models_load_failed: Nabigo to load the pagsasalita mga modelo manifest. Suriin your connection at subukan muli.
strings.settings_speech_models_empty: No pagsasalita mga modelo are available yet.
strings.notes_voice_transcript_offline_no_models: No offline mga modelo are installed. Buksan Offline pagsasalita mga modelo in Mga setting and i-i-download a modelo una.
strings.notes_voice_transcript_offline_quality_h: Offline pagkilala works without internet. Quality depends on the napili modelo, phone performance and microphone conditions. For pinakamataas accuracy, gamitin online pagkilala.
strings.notes_voice_transcript_offline_quality_s: Maaaring mas mababa ang kalidad ng offline kaysa online dahil sa telepono isinasagawa ang pagproseso.
strings.geo_alarm_empty_body: Gumawa a lokasyon-based alarm for entering or leaving a napili area.
strings.geo_alarm_stage1_body: This hakbang stores geo mga alarm, diagnostics and backup data. Pahintulot sa lokasyons and real geofence delivery will be connected in the next hakbang.
strings.geo_alarm_transition_enter_or_exit: Kapag pumapasok o umaalis sa lugar
strings.geo_alarm_delete_confirm_body: This geo alarm ay permanenteng buburahin.
strings.geo_alarm_invalid_latitude: Dapat nasa pagitan ng -90 at 90 ang latitude.
strings.geo_alarm_invalid_longitude: Dapat nasa pagitan ng -180 at 180 ang longitude.
strings.geo_alarm_invalid_data: Suriin geo alarm data at subukan muli.
strings.settings_diagnostics_geo_alarm_body: Geo alarm creation, editing, backup, ibalik and future geofence delivery mga kaganapan.
strings.geo_alarm_runtime_log_empty_body: Gumawa or i-edit geo mga alarm and the lalabas dito ang kaganapan log.
strings.geo_alarm_diagnostics_clear_confirm_body: Lahat ng nakaimbak na geo alarm diagnostic mga kaganapan ay permanenteng buburahin.
strings.geo_alarm_stage2_body: Pahintulot sa lokasyons and geofence registration are connected. When a na-i-save area is triggered, the app writes diagnostics and shows a notification. Buong ringing will be connected in the next hakbang.
strings.geo_alarm_status_google_play_services_un: Hindi available ang Google Play services
strings.geo_alarm_runtime_package2_body: Geofence registration, boot ibalik, transition receiver, diagnostics and notification delivery ay pinagana.
strings.geo_alarm_reliability_body: Location-based mga alarm need lokasyon access, background lokasyon and mga notification. Android may still delay geofence mga kaganapan to i-save battery.
strings.geo_alarm_permission_precise_missing: Only approximate lokasyon or no lokasyon
strings.geo_alarm_permission_background_missing: Allow lahat the oras in app mga setting
strings.geo_alarm_vendor_hint_body: On Xiaomi, Redmi, POCO, MIUI or HyperOS, also allow autostart and alisin battery restrictions for ShiftAlarm. Otherwise geofence mga kaganapan may arrive late.
strings.geo_alarm_stage21_body: This hakbang adds pahintulot shortcuts, pagiging maaasahan hints and richer diagnostics. Buong ringing will be connected pagkatapos geofence behavior is confirmed.
strings.geo_alarm_ringing_channel_description: Geo alarm tunog, vibration and buong-screen mga notification
strings.geo_alarm_cooldown_hint_body: Maaaring balewalain nang ilang minuto ang paulit-ulit na trigger ng parehong transition ng geo-alarm upang maiwasan ang dobleng pagtunog malapit sa hangganan ng zone.
strings.geo_alarm_duplicate_protection_body: Duplicate protection: the same enter or exit kaganapan will hindi ring muli for 3 minutes. The opposite kaganapan can still ring.
strings.geo_alarm_delivery_cooldown: Nilaktawan ang pag-uulit — proteksyon laban sa duplicate
strings.geo_alarm_map_location_unavailable: Kasalukuyan lokasyon is hindi available. Try muli outdoors or suriin lokasyon mga setting.
strings.geo_alarm_map_existing_alarm_body: Napili geo alarm on the map.
strings.geo_alarm_map_bookmarks_later: Naka-save places will be added in a hiwalay hakbang.
strings.geo_alarm_map_provider_later: Google Maps, Yandex Maps, satellite and hybrid layers are reserved for mamaya packages. The kasalukuyan package uses OpenStreetMap.
strings.geo_alarm_radius_step_hint: Radius mga pagbabago in 200 m steps. Pinakamataas: 5000 m.
strings.geo_alarm_radius_reliability_warning: Radius sa ibaba 800 m may trigger mamaya because of battery pag-save and lokasyon accuracy.
strings.geo_alarm_radius_android_hint: For a reliable geo alarm, 800–1000 m is inirerekomenda.
strings.geo_alarm_map_search_not_found: Address was hindi found. Try a buong query: city, street and house numero.
strings.geo_alarm_map_reverse_geocode_online_fir: Address lookup uses online data una, then device geocoder if network is hindi available.
strings.geo_alarm_trigger_hint: The geo alarm will turn on when the napili lokasyon condition is natukoy.
strings.geo_alarm_location_hint_read_only: The point is napili on the map. Dito you can i-edit only the displayed address.
strings.geo_alarm_schedule_type_hint: This alarm uses a napili map area instead of a orasan oras.
strings.geo_alarm_readiness_disabled_hint: Paganahin the geo alarm on the map screen to register its geofence.
strings.geo_alarm_readiness_ready_hint: Mga pahintulot are naka-configure. Geo alarm registration should trabaho.
strings.geo_alarm_readiness_location_hint: Allow lokasyon pahintulot to register the napili area.
strings.geo_alarm_readiness_background_hint: Allow lokasyon access lahat the oras for reliable triggering kapag nakasara ang app.
strings.geo_alarm_readiness_notification_hint: Allow mga notification so the geo alarm can show ringing mga alerto.
strings.geo_alarm_readiness_google_play_hint: Google Play services are kinakailangan for Android geofencing on this device.
strings.geo_alarm_readiness_setup_hint: I-save the geo alarm and the app will register the geofence.
strings.geo_alarm_readiness_error_hint: Suriin mga pahintulot and diagnostics if registration fails.
strings.alarm_duration_hint: The alarm will stop awtomatiko pagkatapos the napili tagal.
strings.geo_alarm_readiness_action_hint: I-tap to buksan pahintulot mga setting.
strings.geo_alarm_schedule_mode_always_hint: The geo alarm is aktibo every araw while pinagana.
strings.geo_alarm_schedule_mode_one_time_hint: After the una successful activation, the geo alarm will be turned off.
strings.geo_alarm_schedule_mode_repeat_days_hint: The geo alarm rings only on napili weekdays.
strings.geo_alarm_schedule_mode_shift_linked_hin: The geo alarm rings only on napili trabaho mga shift.
strings.geo_alarm_repeat_days_required: Pumili kahit isa araw for this geo alarm.
strings.geo_alarm_shift_schedule_empty: No shift mga iskedyul yet. Gumawa a iskedyul una.
strings.geo_alarm_shift_schedule_body: This geo alarm uses the aktibo shift iskedyul only.
strings.geo_alarm_shift_schedule_required: Activate a shift iskedyul bago pag-save a shift-linked geo alarm.
strings.geo_alarm_shift_timing_body: Pumili whether this geo alarm is aktibo on the shift araw, the araw bago it, or the araw pagkatapos it.
strings.geo_alarm_bookmark_remove_alarm_confirm_: Only the na-i-save-place entry ay aalisin. The geo alarm itself will remain.
strings.geo_alarm_bookmark_remove_point_confirm_: Only this na-i-save point ay aalisin. Geo mga alarm will hindi be binago.
strings.geo_alarm_map_location_permission_body: Allow lokasyon pahintulot to show your kasalukuyan place on the map.
strings.geo_alarm_shift_schedule_no_active: No aktibo shift iskedyul. Activate a shift iskedyul una.
strings.geo_alarm_shift_schedule_active_body: This geo alarm will be linked to the aktibo shift iskedyul.
strings.geo_alarm_shift_schedule_inactive_body: This geo alarm is linked to a shift iskedyul that is hindi aktibo now.
strings.geo_alarm_shift_before_window_body: The geo alarm is aktibo only inside this oras window bago the shift starts.
strings.geo_alarm_shift_after_until_crossing_val: Aktibo pagkatapos shift until una geofence crossing
strings.geo_alarm_shift_after_until_crossing_bod: If the geofence is hindi crossed, the pending pagkatapos-shift activation is reset when the next shift starts or at the wakas of the araw.
strings.geo_alarm_shift_after_until_crossing_she: Aktibo pagkatapos shift until una geofence crossing
strings.geo_alarm_map_offline_cache_body: The map will show na-i-save areas if they were opened earlier. Missing areas will load muli when internet is available.
strings.widget_geo_alarm_active_shift_count: Geo mga alarm: {count}, by mga shift: {shiftCount}
strings.widget_config_4x2_body: Pumili two buttons to show on the widget.
strings.widget_config_4x3_body: Pumili two information buttons. Ngayon and orasan are always shown at the top.
strings.widget_config_calendar_4x4_v2_body: Pumili two compact buttons. The calendar and tomorrow iskedyul are always shown.
strings.widget_config_calendar_4x4_v3_body: Transparency lamang ng background ang maaaring i-configure.
strings.alarm_repeat_after_ignored_body: If you do hindi dismiss or snooze it, the alarm will ring muli.
strings.settings_speech_models_download_continue: Modelo downloads continue even if you leave this screen.
strings.settings_permissions_alarm_geo_summary_t: Mga alarm and geo mga alarm
strings.settings_permissions_alarm_geo_summary_b: Set up wake-up alarm pagiging maaasahan, geo-alarm lokasyon access and battery mga setting in one place.
strings.settings_permissions_geo_first_launch_bo: Geo mga alarm need lokasyon access, precise lokasyon and background lokasyon to trigger kapag nakasara ang app. You can paganahin these in app mga setting.
strings.settings_permissions_unrestricted_body: For reliable mga alarm and geo mga alarm, alisin battery restrictions for ShiftAlarm. On Xiaomi/Redmi and similar devices, also allow autostart/aktibidad sa background if available.
strings.settings_backup_save_body: Gumawa a backup file and pumili where to i-save it on this device.
strings.settings_backup_share_body: Gumawa a backup file and buksan the system ibahagi sheet to ipadala it to email, messenger or cloud storage.
strings.settings_backup_export_save_success_body: The backup file was na-i-save to the napili lokasyon.
strings.settings_backup_export_save_error_body: Nabigo to i-save the backup file.
strings.settings_backup_export_share_success_bod: Pumili where to ipadala or upload the backup file.
strings.settings_backup_export_share_error_body: Nabigo to gumawa or ibahagi the backup file.
strings.shifts_salary_deduction_constant_carry_h: Constant mga bawas are carried to the next buwan awtomatiko.
strings.settings_legal_button_body: Buksan terms, privacy patakaran, disclaimer and user gabay.
strings.legal_documents_intro_body: Mga dokumento are available offline. When internet is available, ShiftAlarm can i-i-download kasalukuyan versions and gamitin bundled copies as fallback.
strings.legal_privacy_body: How lokal app data, diagnostics and downloads are handled.
strings.legal_disclaimer_body: Mahalaga pagiging maaasahan mga limitasyon for mga alarm, mga notification and geofences.
strings.legal_help_body: Offline gabay for the pangunahing app mga function.
strings.legal_document_unavailable_body: The dokumento could hindi be opened. Suriin the connection or try muli mamaya.
strings.onboarding_step_welcome_body: ShiftAlarm pinagsasama shift mga iskedyul, mga alarm, geo mga alarm, mga tala, widgets and backup mga tool. The pangunahing screen is na available sa likod this setup window.
strings.onboarding_step_documents_body: Please buksan the app mga dokumento and tanggapin the kinakailangan versions. They ipinaliliwanag terms of gamitin, privacy and pagiging maaasahan mga limitasyon for mga alarm, mga notification and geo mga alarm.
strings.onboarding_documents_required_pending: Mga kinakailangang dokumento ay hindi pa tinatanggap.
strings.onboarding_step_permissions_body: Mga pahintulot are hindi kinakailangan to tingnan the app, but mga alarm, mga paalala and geo mga alarm nakadepende on notification, exact alarm, lokasyon and battery mga setting.
strings.onboarding_permissions_ready: Handa na ang lahat ng mahalagang setting.
strings.onboarding_cannot_continue_documents: Tanggapin ang mga dokumento para magpatuloy
strings.onboarding_permissions_finish_hint: You can tapusin now and bumalik to mga pahintulot mamaya from Mga setting.
strings.settings_help_training_button_body: Buksan the offline user gabay in a hiwalay browser window.
strings.help_training_offer_body: Buksan the user gabay to alamin what each pangunahing function does, where it is matatagpuan, what to i-tap and what to suriin if something does hindi trabaho as inaasahan.
strings.help_training_offer_hint: The gabay bumubukas as a hiwalay lokal pahina, so you can switch between the gabay and the app while pagsunod the steps.
strings.help_training_offer_open_failed: The gabay could hindi be opened. Try muli from Mga setting.
strings.settings_theme_language_group_title: Mga setting ng tema at wika
strings.settings_theme_language_group_body: Theme, app wika and offline pagsasalita mga modelo are pinagsama dito.
strings.settings_documents_instruction_group_bod: Mga dokumento, help, pagsasanay and the user gabay are pinagsama dito.
strings.notes_audio_delete_recording_confirm_bod: The recording “{name}” ay aalisin from this tala.
strings.notes_advance_reminder_delete_confirm_bo: The paunang paalala {time} bago the napiling oras ay buburahin.
strings.world_clock_remove_confirm_body: The mundo orasan for {name} ay aalisin.
strings.alarm_repeat_days_required_error: Pumili kahit isa araw for a paulit-ulit na alarm.
strings.notes_delete_checklist_item_confirm_body: This item ay aalisin from the checklist.
strings.notes_delete_bullet_item_confirm_body: This item ay aalisin from the may bullet list.
strings.notes_delete_numbered_item_confirm_body: This item ay aalisin from the may numero list.
strings.settings_speech_models_delete_confirm_bo: The modelo “{model}” and its lokal mga file ay buburahin. You can i-i-download the modelo muli mamaya.
strings.alarm_runtime_log_empty_body: Run the alarm mga scenario muli and the lalabas dito ang kaganapan log.
strings.alarm_shift_linked_inactive_schedule_err: Activate this shift iskedyul bago pag-save a shift alarm.
strings.timer_notification_channel_finished_desc: Mga alerto kapag tapos ang timer
strings.settings_backup_validation_invalid_json: Ang napiling file ay hindi a wastong JSON backup.
strings.settings_backup_validation_wrong_app: Ang napiling file ay hindi a ShiftAlarm backup.
strings.settings_backup_validation_unsupported_s: Hindi suportadong bersyon ng backup schema: {version}.
strings.settings_backup_validation_settings_inco: Backup mga setting block ay hindi kumpleto: {fields}.
strings.settings_backup_validation_clock_incompl: Backup orasan block ay hindi kumpleto.
strings.settings_backup_validation_timer_incompl: Backup timer block ay hindi kumpleto: {fields}.
strings.settings_backup_validation_stopwatch_inc: Backup stopwatch block ay hindi kumpleto: {fields}.
strings.settings_backup_validation_shifts_incomp: Backup mga shift block ay hindi kumpleto.
strings.settings_backup_validation_shift_salary_: Backup shift sahod mga setting block ay hindi kumpleto.
strings.settings_backup_validation_notes_incompl: Backup mga tala block ay hindi kumpleto.
strings.settings_backup_validation_note_audio_in: Backup mga tala audio mga file block ay hindi kumpleto.
strings.settings_backup_validation_geo_alarms_in: Backup geo mga alarm block ay hindi kumpleto.
strings.settings_backup_validation_geo_bookmarks: Backup geo alarm mga bookmark block ay hindi kumpleto.
strings.diagnostics_email_shift_problem_prompt: Please ilarawan the shift or iskedyul problema sa ibaba:
strings.notes_transcript_error_permission: Kulang pagkilala sa pagsasalita mga pahintulot.
strings.notes_transcript_error_network: Pagkilala sa pagsasalita error sa network.
strings.notes_transcript_error_network_timeout: Pagkilala sa pagsasalita nag-timeout ang network.
strings.notes_transcript_error_service: Pagkilala sa pagsasalita error sa serbisyo.
strings.notes_transcript_error_empty: Pagkilala sa pagsasalita nagbalik ng walang laman na text.
strings.notes_transcript_error_offline_model_una: Offline pagsasalita modelo hindi available ang directory.
strings.notes_transcript_error_offline_empty: Offline pagkilala sa pagsasalita nagbalik ng walang laman na text.
strings.notes_transcript_error_generic_code: Pagkilala sa pagsasalita nabigo. Code ng error: {code}.
